heading: Persons born in Alaska on or afterMarch 30, 1867
label: 1404 Persons born in Alaska on or afterMarch 30, 1867
text: A person born in Alaska on or after , except a noncitizen Indian, is a citizen of the United States at birth. A noncitizen Indian born in Alaska on or after , and prior to , is declared to be a citizen of the United States as of . An Indian born in Alaska on or after , is a citizen of the United States at birth.March 30, 1867March 30, 1867June 2, 1924June 2, 1924June 2, 1924
